basic_details.job_title: SSB Sports Quota Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 404 Constable GD Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB), Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Documentation + Sports Achievement Verification + PST + Field Trial/Skill Test + DME + RME
basic_details.short_information: Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) under Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India has published the detailed advertisement for recruitment of 404 Sportspersons as Constable (General Duty) under Sports Quota for the year 2026. Online applications are invited from eligible Male & Female candidates for filling up these Group 'C' Non-Gazetted, (Non-Ministerial) Combatised posts. The recruitment is temporary but likely to be continued. Candidates with outstanding sports achievements in various disciplines can apply online. The last date for submission of online applications will be 30 days from the dat

important_dates.cut-off date for sports achievements (la: 30 days from the date of publication in Employment News

age_limit.details: Age Limit: 18 to 23 years as on the closing date of receipt of applications.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the following eligibility conditions as on the last date of receipt of applications: | Educational Qualification: Matriculation or equivalent from a recognized Board or Institute. | Sports Qualification (Order of Preference): | Represented India in International competitions, OR Medal winners in Senior/Junior National Championships, OR Medal winners in Khelo India Youth/University/Winter/Para Games, OR Medal winners in SGFI, OR Represented University in Inter-University Tournaments, OR Represented State School Teams in National School Games. | Note: Sports achievements of only last 02 years (as on cut-off date) will be considered.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix Rs. 21,700 - 69,100/- (Level-3) + Allowances as admissible in SSB

selection_process: Category Male Height Female Height Male Chest (Un-expanded / Expanded)
Relaxed Categories (as per notification) 157 cm to 165 cm 147.5 cm to 155 cm As per rules
The selection will be conducted in Two Stages:
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official SSB Recruitment website www.recruitment.ssb.gov.in. Candidates should follow the instructions carefully while filling Part-I (Details), Part-II (Photo, Signature & Documents upload) and Part-III (Payment).
important_instructions: Only Indian citizens (or subjects of Nepal/Bhutan with permission) are eligible. Candidates must bring all original documents at the time of documentation. Persons already in Government service must apply through proper channel and submit NOC at documentation stage. Falsification of documents or canvassing will lead to disqualification. Selected candidates will be governed under New Pension Scheme (NPS). Performance of selected sportspersons will be reviewed periodically. SSB reserves the right to cancel/postpone the recruitment without any reason. PwD candidates are not eligible for this recruitment.
